title: [lora_l2.c:700] lichen_lora_l2_set_rx_callback no state check
description: Function: lichen_lora_l2_set_rx_callback. Contract violation: The function modifies callback state under mutex but does not check if the module is initialized or in the 'aborted' state. If called after k_thread_abort(), the lora_mutex may be corrupted and acquiring it could deadlock. While unlikely in normal use, the other functions (start, stop, tx) all check for aborted state before mutex acquisition - this function should too for consistency. Priority 3 because the function is typically only called during setup when races are unlikely.
close_reason: Fixed: Added state check at function entry that rejects with LOG_WRN and returns early if module is in LORA_UNINIT state, matching the pattern used by lichen_lora_l2_get_eui64
